Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christy Gargalis, Esq. of Robie & Matthai, (213) 706-8000, for Defendants and Moving Parties
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THERE BEING NO CRC 324 COMPLIANCE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JOEL BRUCE DOUGLAS and BONNE, BRIDGES, MUELLER, O'KEEFE & NICHOLS' Motion For Change Of Venue is granted based on mixed action rule. Motion for monetary sanctions is denied. There is 1) no evidence regarding offer to stipulate to change and 2) San Francisco venue was chosen in good faith. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/REQ/jf) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR # 2647
